title: woodsia bellii
intro: Woodsia bellii, also known as Bell's woodsia, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Woodsiaceae. It is native to the western United States and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may provide health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, and protecting against cell damage. Woodsia bellii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including arthritis and digestive issues.
